textByHashes.ea0ecd7d252f4e1eca9bf36857eb78601a101501: We're from the College of Bards in Tempestus. We thought we'd set up camp here to do some performances for anyone travelling through the savannah.
textByHashes.215ba64c9b66e154c93a42e3ff4bf44b14fba022: With the kingdom now open to tourists, we've had plenty of new fans!
textByHashes.e6df5eb504a25c6ff4d49038faf52290695edb69: Thanks! I made it myself. The College of Bards insist that we all have the ability to create and maintain our own instruments. I'm quite proud of what I came up with!
textByHashes.be5b5181df382ce68e6d24b66e6018c1aa15fad2: Think you've got what it takes to join the College of Bards?
textByHashes.0677e9246dc28fb6e421e23350958fe1da5ad185: Well it only takes a lifetime of practice, so maybe give it a go one day.
textByHashes.606c87cdbd1c5dbeb2732ee6258d381e4b78bdf3: I am, though I do wish it would be blocked by the ferry to Tempestus.
textByHashes.f24364890cff554dc01430d88e1c89b36d86e6f4: I'm not sure exactly. All I know is that it's not running at the moment.
textByHashes.dd9f17d6e68d0289ff138d887df04f87ff84df33: We should be back at the College of Bards already, but I'm sure they'll understand why we got delayed.
textByHashes.6318f2ddc5da5b7145c1c178da8ad015ad4bb88a: Maybe. Can you take us to Temptestus?
textByHashes.0a74e2110f7cec2d79590f281a7aaf2941fd509c: Then I'm afraid you don't get any singing this time.
textByHashes.4520977cca0a9a95fd08569a992d3efcb2cdb18b: Nilsal! Have you come to hear a song from the Sister Songstresses of the College of Bards?
textByHashes.3022b646f1a859b7a187d1f5e8c9eddd9838b1ae: Don't be silly! Of course we aren't!
textByHashes.ce72c5e739d2eb542f40bbacc025cfe9410de7a5: Well, we realised when we met that we were all very similar, so we've been using it as a selling point! Everyone loves Snappy Sister, Stormy Sister, and of course me, Spirited Sister!
textByHashes.d2c1bbe4ab882fc17989d44b9cd5e63f48f6cb66: People love a nice story about a trio of sisters coming together! So yes, it works rather well.
textByHashes.8e9f26cc0ca4d77df84a8098e78c16bb7bdb50cb: It's all storytelling! Songs, appearance, history. We're telling a story and people want to hear it!
textByHashes.32afa58c76020e8ecf130cfcd2a917100be40d14: Is it made better if our songs are good?
textByHashes.cfcf47f93237f01c2b8be678cface8ba793e4f16: Well, you're just no fun, iknami.
textByHashes.79ce2c3c33c005951f52cb03d101a9997bc7bfd3: I just want to get back to the College of Bards. It's like my spark has gone out being away from such a creative environment.
textByHashes.37e5c8edffe2ed41f29268186977ea988164a1d4: Hope can be a great inspiration... Perfect! I'll use that!
